KAILAS Ole Hard Shell Down Jacket, priced over 4000 yuan in official stores, offers hard-shell level full protection. It provides all-weather defense and excellent warmth in cold, variable conditions. This 2-in-1 jacket combines a hard shell with down insulation. The outer layer uses GORE-TEX fabric, a top-tier windproof, waterproof, and breathable membrane that shields you from wind, rain, and snow like a hard-shell jacket, keeping you dry in harsh weather.

The inner layer is filled with 700-fill-power goose down, a high-performance rating ensuring superior warmth while remaining lightweight and compressible. It features the CoreHeat graphene technology for core temperature retention, specially protecting the heart area to maintain full-body warmth circulation.

Designed for outdoor activities, it includes an adjustable 3D windproof hood that fits snugly to block cold wind, a windproof hood design to protect the neck, underarm ventilation zippers with two-way opening for efficient heat release, large dual side zipper pockets for easy access, adjustable Velcro cuffs to prevent slipping and wind entry, and drawstrings at both hem sides to quickly seal out wind and snow. Inside is a large mesh pocket for gloves and essentials.

This jacket is built as a battle-ready gear for severe climates. If you seek ultimate performance and reliability, it is a highly recommended choice.

Colors: Pale Yellow, Mineral Black  
Sizes: S-2XL

The KAILAS 5000GT Snow Mountain Down Jacket is a high-end item combining professional outdoor performance with trendy design. Its ultra-light fabric is windproof and breathable, effectively blocking cold wind while quickly wicking moisture to prevent overheating or dampness-related heat loss. The fabric is treated with water-repellent coating to resist snow and light rain, keeping the down dry and ensuring warmth.

Exclusive New Arrival: KAILAS Short Puffer Jacket

Say goodbye to bulk and embrace lightweight warmth with the KAILAS short puffer jacket, designed for outdoor enthusiasts and daily commuters alike. Filled with high-quality insulation like Primaloft fibers, it offers excellent warmth even in damp, cold conditions. 

The jacket features a three-proof fabric that is water-repellent, oil-resistant, and easy to clean, protecting you from harsh weather and everyday stains. Its short, slim fit flatters your figure and pairs well with sportswear, jeans, or utility skirts. 

Breathable mesh panels under the arms and on the back ensure ventilation and comfort during activity. Thoughtful details include elastic cuffs to block wind, an adjustable hem drawstring to keep out cold, and multiple zippered pockets for convenient storage.

Perfect for hiking, trekking, camping, or city commuting, this jacket combines warmth and style effortlessly.

KAILASH Hooded Cotton Jacket can be worn as an inner or outer layer, offering warmth and protection in various weather conditions with excellent temperature regulation. The jacket’s detailed design reflects professionalism and user-friendliness. The adjustable hood fits snugly for enhanced wind and rain protection, improving insulation. KAILASH delivers genuine top-tier outdoor performance gear, not just stylish wear.

KAILAS 2025SS Autumn/Winter New Hooded Down Jacket features 100D high-density nylon taffeta fabric (≥200T) with DWR durable water-repellent treatment, ensuring lightweight and tear resistance. It uses a no-liner down-proof construction, requiring higher outer fabric density. The membrane structure enhances wind resistance with a microporous windproof membrane composite, preventing down leakage and improving warmth. Sizes: S-XL.

KAILAS MONT-X Series All-Weather Outdoor Hard Shell Jacket is a professional waterproof, windproof, and breathable mountaineering shell. Durable and abrasion-resistant, it features pockets on the cuffs and inside. Underarm zippers enhance ventilation, and a detachable wind skirt is included. High-performance design with large cross pockets for easy access even when carrying a backpack. The 360° adjustable hood moves with the face for unobstructed vision and compatibility. High collar improves warmth, with a neck zipper for quick temperature adjustment during activity. 3D tailored fit suits Asian body shapes, ideal for mountaineering, skiing, and ice climbing. Fabric contours the body to boost moisture-wicking and insulation. Movement-friendly design mimics climbing postures for maximum flexibility without restriction. Available sizes: XS-XXL.

KAILAS Bogda Series LT Lightweight Windproof, Waterproof Outdoor Hiking and Mountaineering Jacket

- Materials: Original version dismantled for development; custom small labels, collar tags, wash labels, hang tags, hardware, etc.
- FILTERTEC L Fabric: Developed by KAILAS, composed of outer D-nylon, middle eTFE nano microporous membrane, and inner skin-friendly treatment. Waterproof rating: mm; breathability: g/m²/h. Resists heavy rain and strong wind while quickly wicking sweat to prevent stuffiness.
- Fully Taped Seams: All seams fully taped to prevent water ingress, combined with DWR water-repellent coating for double waterproof protection.
- Integrated Hood and Adjustable Cuffs & Hem: Hood with adjustable cuffs and hem to block cold wind and rain.
- Underarm Ventilation Zippers: Extended underarm zippers create front-to-back airflow when opened, quickly releasing heat and preventing chills.
- Breathable Membrane Technology: Middle eTFE membrane features nano-scale micropores smaller than water droplets but allow water vapor to pass freely for high breathability.
- Adjustable 3D Hood: Helmet-compatible with multi-dimensional adjustments for a snug fit, excellent wind protection, and unobstructed vision.
- Raised Zippered Pockets: Designed for easy access even when wearing a backpack.
- YKK Waterproof Zippers: Main zipper is two-way for easy access when wearing a harness; pocket zippers are waterproof to protect phones, IDs, and small items from rain.
- Ergonomic D-shaped Elbows: Designed for natural arm movement, reducing restriction during activity.
- Lightweight Design: Weighs approximately kg (size M), minimizing burden during long hikes and easily packable in a backpack.
- Colors: Dark Cyan Black, Navy Blue, Light Gray, Mineral Cobalt Pink, Mountain Green
- Sizes: XS-XXL (Measurements for length, shoulder width, chest circumference, and weight approx. provided per size)
